criteria.definition: Identifies that tool.execute.after (tool-hooks.ts) hashes output.output unconditionally, MCP results arrive as {content:[...]} with no string output key, so crypto throws on undefined and the after-hook error surfaces as the tool failing.
Cites the specific location (tool-hooks.ts, the hashContent(output.output) call in the loop/after path), not a vague area.
Did NOT modify code (diagnosis only); proportionate investigation.
